Guard.name: Heavy Armor Mastery
Guard.description: Increases Guard Recharge when heavy-remodeled armor is equipped.

Guard.name: Advanced Guard
Physical Guard
Guard.description:
Increases Ailment Resistance from Guard when running low on HP.
Higher skill level enables the skill to be activated with more HP remaining.

Guard.name: Light Armor Mastery
Guard.description: Increases Evasion Recharge when light-remodeled armor is equipped.

Guard.name: Advanced Evasion
Guard.description:
Increases Evasion Recharge when light-remodeled armor is equipped.
The amount raised per level is the same as the effect of
Light Armor Mastery
.

Guard.name: Mirage Evasion
Guard.description:
Evasion becomes usable while charging or casting.
The effect of this skill is lost for a few seconds if used. The duration depends on the skill level.

Shield.name: Shield Mastery
Shield.description: Enhance Attack Speed when equipping a shield.

Shield.name: Shield Bash
Shield.description: Bash with the shield. Chance to inflict [Stun] on the target.

Shield.name: Shield Cannon
Shield.description: Throw the shield like a cannonball. Chance to inflict [Stun] on the target. Damage dealt increases if the target is stunned.

Shield.name: Guard Strike
Shield.description:
Attack repelling an enemy's attack. Deal damage to a target when Guard is activated. The damage dealt depends on Guard Power and the refinement value of your shield.
Shield
Guard Power is added to Power
Refinement Value of Shield affects Skill Power

Shield.name: Force Shield
Shield.description: DEF and Physical Resistance are added when equipping a shield.

Shield.name: Magical Shield
Shield.description: Increases MDEF and Magic Resistance when equipping a shield.

Shield.name: Shield Uppercut
Shield.description: A powerful uppercut with a shield. Chance to inflict [Tumble]. Damage Reduction and Guard will be activated during this skill.

Shield.name: Dual Shields
Shield.description: Your iron will is stronger than a castle wall. Equips two shields and maintains the state of Guard during combat. Heavy armor increases Guard range and removes the interval of normal attacks.

Shield.name: Shield Repair
Shield.description:
Repairs your shield and recovers its durability.
Recovers the Guard power consumed. Also recovers MP depending on the recovered Guard.

Shield.name: Belagerung
Shield.description:
Only available during the Skill: "Dual Shields".
Deals AoE damage twice and ends "Dual Shields". Increases damage to an immobile target.
Shield
"Immobile" refers to [Flinch], [Tumble] and [Stun].
Applies a debuff to the target when equipped with heavy armor.
The debuff lasts for 15 seconds.
Reduces Critical resistance depending on the level of Belagerung.
Increases the damage dealt and Attack MP Recovery if the target is immobile.

Shield.name: Protection
Shield.description:
Increase party members' Physical Resistance and decrease Magic Resistance for a limited time.
Shield
Mp Cost -200

Shield.name: Aegis
Shield.description:
Increase party members' Magic Resistance and decrease Physical Resistance for a limited time.
Shield
Mp Cost -200

Shield.name: Guardian
Shield.description:
Creates an area that reduces damage taken. Increase Guard Recharge. ATK decreases and Aggro greatly increases as more mates are in the area. Your shield's refinement value affects the damage reduction.
Shield
[Refinement Value of Shield affects the effects below]
Raises Guard Recharge further.
Boost on Damage Reduction of allies protected by this skill.
Boost on Aggro Reduction of allies protected by this skill.

Dagger.name: Throwing Knife
Dagger.description:
Attack by throwing a dagger.
MP Cost becomes 0 when reaching Lv10 and normal attack proration will be applied.

Dagger.name: Spike Dart
Dagger.description: Disturb the target's movement by throwing a dagger at the feet. The damage increases as DEX is higher. Chance to inflict [Slow Down] on the target.

Dagger.name: Gatling Knife
Dagger.description: Throw a lot of knives single-mindedly. The damage increases as STR, AGI and DEX are higher.

Dagger.name: Amazing Throw
Dagger.description: An astounding throwing skill. Add the chance to increase hit counts to all the Dagger Skills.

Dagger.name: Poison Dagger
Dagger.description: Attack with a poisoned dagger. The damage increases as INT is higher. Chance to inflict [Poison].

Dagger.name: Double Stab
Dagger.description:
Raises the next dagger skill power used after Evasion. Requires some time to reactivate after 1 activation. Reactivate faster by leveling the skill.
Has no effect on skills that do not consume MP.

Dagger.name: Hidden Arm
Dagger.description: Chance to add small damage to normal attacks by equipping a dagger.

Dagger.name: Intensive Knife
Dagger.description: Increase the damage and activation rate of Hidden Arm.

Dagger.name: Mail Breaker
Dagger.description:
Ignore certain amount of DEF when using Hidden Arm.
The next normal attack gets Critical Rate +75, Attack MP Recovery +100% at a small probability.

Dagger.name: Knife Combat
Dagger.description:
Normal attacks turn into Dagger attacks. Increases Critical Rate and Attack MP Recovery. Reduces Evasion consumption during normal attack. Removes "normal attack proration". The effect ends when you use another skill.
Dagger
The normal attacks during Knife Combat are enhanced by Hidden Arm, Intensive Knife, and Mail Breaker.

Dagger.name: Flincher Knife
Dagger.description:
Chance to inflict "Flinch" to a foe targeting you and turns into Knife Combat mode. Increases damage and Physical Pierce when not being targeted.
Dagger
If this skill hits the target, it will shortened the time for the skill "Double Stab" to reactivate.
Since this skill is not a throwing skill, it is not affected by the skill "Double Stab" or "Amazing Throw".

Knight.name: Assault Attack
Knight.description:
Rush at the target. Chance to inflict [Slow Down] on the target.
Shield
Power +25
Skill power +50
Knock Back Rate +50%

Knight.name: Parry
Knight.description: Parry attacks using the weapon. Chance to reduce physical damage. The skill will not be activated with Guard.

Knight.name: P. Defense
Knight.description: Perform perfect defense. Reduce damage to 0 with a shield and restore small amount of HP.

Knight.name: Fareth
Knight.description:
Staying still increases the effect (
5 Levels
). Enhances Attack Speed, Physical Pierce, Normal Attack Power, Fractional Damage Reduction.
VIT affects Attack Speed and Physical Pierce.

Knight.name: Aftershield
Knight.description:
Gains a damage reduction effect for a certain period of time after activating P. Defense.
Acquiring this skill will slightly increase Neutral Resistance permanently too.
1-Handed Sword
Negates fatal damage exceeding your MaxHP taken while Aftershield is active. However, once the damage negation takes place, you will be unable to activate Aftershield for some time.
Provoke

Knight.name: Provoke
Knight.description: Provoke the enemy to target you.

Knight.name: Rage Sword
Knight.description:
Attack with raw hostility. It is a special attack to get more Aggro. When targeted, Critical Rate increases and MP Cost for the next skill used will be halved.
Shield
Power +30
Power increases depending on VIT.
Skill Power +100

Knight.name: Binding Strike
Knight.description:
Generates a shock wave and deal damage to enemies around you. Chance to inflict [Stop] on targets. A special attack that produces a lot of Aggro.
Shield
Power +150
Power increases depending on VIT.
Skill Power +150

Knight.name: Knight Will
Knight.description:
Shows effect if target turns hostile towards you. Aggro will increase more easily and the effect of Lv 10 Knight Skills up to Skill Tree Lv 3 will be enhanced further.
(
Does not apply to Tier 3 and Tier 4 skills
)
Shield
Raises aggro further.
Raises the power of Lv10 Assault Attack.
Raises the aggro of Lv10 Provoke.
Raises the activation rate of Lv10 Parry.
Raises the power and aggro of Lv10 Rage Sword.
Raises the power of Lv10 Binding Strike.
Raises the recovery limit of Lv10 P. Defense.

Knight.name: Blink Sword
Knight.description:
Throws a sword to instantly close the distance to the target. Chance to inflict [Flinch]. When successful, Fractional Damage can be reduced for 3 seconds and the effect of Fareth will not be lost even if you move.
1-Handed Sword
Gains an effect that guarantees Blink Sword hit if [Flinch] is successfully inflicted. A MISS will cause it to fail to activate.
Sonic Thrust

Knight.name: Sonic Thrust
Knight.description:
Attack with sword aura causing enemy to lose his balance. Chance to inflict [Tumble] on the target.
Shield
Power increases depending on DEX.
If the tumble effect is blocked due to the duration of resistance, MP will be restored a little bit

Knight.name: Revenir
Knight.description:
A hit that overwhelms a powerful enemy in the way. Hit count increases
(max 3 hits)
if conditions are met.
However, the effect that adds hit count won't be active if a status ailment is inflicted.
This attack does not cause proration.
Shield
Critical guaranteed
Gets 1 effect that increases hit count when P. Defense is successful
Gets 1 effect that adds hit count when inflicting [Flinch]
Gets 3 effects that add hit count when inflicting [Tumble]
Gets 5 effects that add hit count when inflicting [Stun]
The effect can be accumulated up to skill level

Knight.name: Knight's Stance
Knight.description:
Signifies the vow of a knight. Increase VIT and the amount of aggro raised for 6 minutes. Fractional damage from monster is slightly reduced if you are pulling aggro toward each other while the effect is active.
Shield
Raises aggro further.
Boost on fractional damage reduction.
Raises resistance to fear while the skill "War Cry" is active.

Knight.name: Knight's Remedy
Knight.description:
A portion of damage received while Knight's Stance is active will be accumulated and restored as HP.
When Knight's Stance is activated again, the total accumulation will be used to restore HP.
Shield
Accumulates more damage from the target if you are pulling aggro toward each other.

Knight.name: Knight Pledge
Knight.description:
Creates an area that gives protection with the sword of oaths. Within the area, ATK increases and high damage resistance (
decreases with each use
) is given except to yourself. Disappears if you get a knockback. The more characters in the area, the weaker the effect will be.
1-Handed Sword
When getting a knockback within the area, the distance can be reduced greatly, but the effect will end as the sword gets knocked away.
Furthermore, ATK boost, knockback and damage reduction effect will be shared if there are multiple characters within the area, making the effect weaker.
Shield
Resistance to knockback increases further.
ATK will increase further based on your shield's refinement value.

Priest.name: Bless
Priest.description:
Restore HP a little at fixed intervals. The heal amount and duration depend on Lv.
Staff
INT affects Heal Amount
MATK amount that affects Heal Amount +1%

Priest.name: Gloria
Priest.description:
Increases DEF and MDEF for a short time. Also raises Guard Recharge if you equip a shield.
Staff
Guard Recharge of shield users affected by this skill is raised further

Priest.name: Enhanced Bless
Priest.description:
Enhance the healing effect of [Bless]. If the level of [Bless] is 10, add more duration, healing amount and Staff bonuses.
Staff
MATK amount that affects Heal Amount +1%
If the skill level of Bless is 10, INT affects Heal Amount

Priest.name: Royal Heal
Priest.description: Restores your HP and that of the allies around. Unlike Heal from Support Skill, there is no effect to reduce revival time.

Priest.name: Sacred Teaching
Priest.description:
Grants temporary HP exceeding your MaxHP when recovering with a Heal-type skill(
*
). ATK and MATK will slightly increase according to the value of temporary HP gained.
All Weapons
(
*
)If the total HP (MaxHP + temporary HP) exceeds the 99,999 HP limit, the number of temporary HP gained will be reduced.
Holy Fist

Priest.name: Holy Fist
Priest.description:
Smite evil with Light elemental punch. Deals physical and magic damage at the same time. It is categorized as a Physical Skill.
Staff
2x Magic Power
Magic Power increases depending on INT.
Knuckle
2x Physical Power
Physical Power increases depending on STR.

Priest.name: Holy Light
Priest.description:
Punish evil monsters with holy power. Deal magic damage of Light element to a target and recover some HP.
Staff
Power +100
Power increases depending on INT.
Magic Device
MaxHP Recovery increases depending on INT.

Priest.name: Ether Barrier
Priest.description: Generate a barrier that absorbs shock. The resistance to the status ailment: [Flinch] increases for a short period of time.

Priest.name: Prayer
Priest.description:
Offers a prayer to increase Mana. Raises MATK for some time. Chance to remove [Weaken] when activated.
Staff
Duration +50sec
Magic Device
Boost on MATK
Shield
Weaken removal rate +25%

Priest.name: Aspis Soul
Priest.description:
The shield of faith. Gains a permanent effect that reduces Fractional Damage aimed at you. Also gains an effect that prevents status ailments at a certain time.
All Weapons
When in a party, Fractional Damage resistance is increased further according to the number of members (
up to 3
) who are still alive.
The effect that prevents status ailments is gained at the beginning of a boss battle and when naturally recovering from a status ailment.
Staff Thrust

Priest.name: Staff Thrust
Priest.description:
A powerful hit with a staff. Ignores the target's defense as STR gets higher. Chance to inflict [Flinch] on the target.
Shield
Flinch Rate +25%

Priest.name: Exorcism
Priest.description:
Performs light element magic attack around you. Halves MP Cost of the next skill used.
The power increases further when used on a dark element target, and there is a chance to inflict either [Dizzy/Dazzled/Fear].

Priest.name: Holy Book
Priest.description:
Dark Resistance slightly increases for 10 minutes. When dealing magic damage to a non-light element target, there is a chance to get an extra activation of the Holy Light learned.
โ€ขNot all magic damage can activate the Holy Light.
1-Handed Sword
The Holy Light that activates will have the bonus from Staff
Magic Device
The time for Holy Light to reactivate is halved
Shield
The activation rate of Holy Light is doubled

Priest.name: Nemesis
Priest.description:
Deals physical damage on the enemy and makes it a target of divine retribution.
The effect will stack and when activating this skill again, a magic AoE will be added according to the number of stacks.
1-Handed Sword
[Using it with a staff or knuckles doesn't change the content.]
A line linking you with the divine retribution target is shown. Being too far from the target cancels the divine retribution.
The effect will stack when dealing damage to the linked target or receiving damage.
The stacked effect is lost when afflicted by Silence.
1-Handed Sword
[Using it with a staff or knuckles doesn't change the content.]
When the buff from this skill is active, Exorcism and Holy Book will ignore the elemental conditions and Dual Element with (
Magic Device
) will be added.
Magic Device
Magic attack range (Radius) +2.5m
Shield
Power increases depending on STR.
Duration x2

Priest.name: Holy Grace
Priest.description:
A miracle that blesses the good ones and punishes the evil ones. Grants an effect that maintains item effect once to the party for a certain period of time even if you get knocked out. Halves the MP Cost for the character that activates Holy Grace when using the next skill.
Staff
[Get the same effect when used with a magic device (main).]
Deals magic damage to all monsters in the battle you are in if the effect that halves the MP Cost of the next skill used is consumed with a certain buff skill. It is a damage with "normal attack proration".

Assassin.name: Assassin Stab
Assassin.description:
Deal a fatal blow to target. The effectiveness of the attack depends on the hit direction. Aim for target's back to maximize it.
Dagger
[Using it with a Ninjutsu Scroll will give you the same effects.]
Power +50 for Front Stab
Power +100 for Side Stab
Power +300 for Back Stab

Assassin.name: Backstep
Assassin.description:
A technique to instantly escape from danger. If you manage to move a certain distance away, the power of Assassin Stab used next increases.
Restore a little MP when the use is timed with the monster's attack warning.
Dagger
[Using it with a Ninjutsu Scroll will give you the same effects.]
MP Heal Amount x2

Assassin.name: Arcane Strike
Assassin.description: A secret technique passed down from an assassin squad. Use all MP and enhances Attack MP Recovery until the next skill is activated. Significantly reduce Aggro on you when not targeted.

Assassin.name: Sicarius
Assassin.description: Raises the power of Back Stab with lasting effect. Successful Back Stab execution will slightly enhance ATK and Physical Pierce for a short time. Damage received will be slightly reduced and the enhancement effect will be lost.

Assassin.name: Secret Assassin
Assassin.description:
Deepens your understanding of assassination techniques. Increases the power of the skill "Assassin Stab" and "Arcane Strike".
Dagger
[Using it with a Ninjutsu Scroll will give you the same effects.]
Increases Assassin Stab power further.
Evasion

Assassin.name: Evasion
Assassin.description:
A technique to improve the ability to dodge. Increase dodge rate for a certain period of time and remove Status Ailment: [Slow].
Dagger
[Using it with a Ninjutsu Scroll will give you the same effects.]
Duration x2
Dodge Boost +10

Assassin.name: Serum
Assassin.description:
A technique to ease and relieve pain. Reduce damage over time due to status ailments: [Poison] and [Ignite] for a certain period of time.
Dagger
[Using it with a Ninjutsu Scroll will give you the same effects.]
Duration x3

Assassin.name: Foresight
Assassin.description: Exceed the limit of your ability to dodge. Lower monster's minimum accuracy and makes it easier to dodge attacks. The power of Assassin Stab is also raised.

Assassin.name: Shadow Walk
Assassin.description:
Briefly grants additional attack effect together with Evasion if not targeted. (Range depends on weapon.) Certain moves enhance the additional attack, but
the effect is reset if you take damage while targeted.
Can't be used repeatedly.
Dagger
[Using it with a Ninjutsu Scroll will give you the same effects.]
Enhance additional attack by using Evasion, Assassin Stab or Backstep (only if successful).
When the enhancement value is 10 or more, it will be consumed to super enhance additional attack if damage is received while Evasion happens.

Assassin.name: Assault Chase
Assassin.description:
Restores Evasion by 50% if a new buff is gained and decreases the consumption of Evasion toward (or around) the attack target for 180 seconds.
The buff effect will end too once the remaining Evasion count hits 0.
All Weapons
A successful dodge with Evasion while the buff is active will add an effect that increases close-range attack power.
Adds Evasion effect to Assault Chase's activation animation only if the skill level is 10.
Dagger
[Using it with a Ninjutsu Scroll will give you the same effects.]
Decreases the consumption of Evasion further.
Increases the amount of close-range attack power added when Evasion is successful. (
maximum limit remains unchanged
)
Venom Injection

Assassin.name: Venom Injection
Assassin.description:
An assassination technique by applying poison to your weapon. Consumes your HP to gain the chance to inflict poison during normal attacks. The chance depends on the stats of dagger, ninjutsu scroll and changes based on Critical or Graze.
1-Handed Sword
The chance of inflicting poison goes up according to skill level.
Halberd
The chance of inflicting poison goes up according to skill level.
Bare Hand
The chance of inflicting poison goes up according to skill level.
Corrosive Poison

Assassin.name: Corrosive Poison
Assassin.description:
Enables the stacking of poison with Venom Injection (
max +2
). If it turns into enhanced poison due to the stacking, the player's attack will also be able to inflict poison damage.
Venom Thief

Assassin.name: Venom Thief
Assassin.description:
Absorbs the corrosive poison from the target to restore your own HP and get rid of the poison status. If it is enhanced poison, MP will also be restored. If not poisoned, you will get an effect that prevents you from getting poisoned.
Death Reception

Assassin.name: Death Reception
Assassin.description:
Uses the poison absorbed with Venom Thief to inflict damage and Deadly Poison to the target. Depending on the poison used, damage that inflicts poison to your surroundings will also be generated additionally.
1-Handed Sword
Power increases depending on DEX.
Physical Pierce +25%.
Halberd
Power increases depending on AGI.
Physical Pierce +25%.
Bare Hand
Power increases depending on your level.
Physical Pierce +25%.
Poison Master

Assassin.name: Poison Master

Wizard.name: Familia
Wizard.description: Summons familiar and while it's around, MATK, MaxMP and Additional Magic increase a little. The familiar may flee if it receives damage.

Wizard.name: Lightning
Wizard.description: Familiar is told to perform a lightning magic. Deals wind element magic damage to the target. Chance to inflict [Paralysis] on the target.

Wizard.name: Blizzard
Wizard.description: Familiar is told to perform a snowstorm magic. Creates a wide AOE that does water element magic damage. Chance to inflict [Freeze] on the target.

Wizard.name: Meteor Strike
Wizard.description:
Familiar is told to perform a meteorite magic. Drops 3 meteorites near the target. Chance to inflict [Ignite] & [Dizzy].
You need luck too to make them hit the target.

Wizard.name: Imperial Ray
Wizard.description: An Attack technique to unleash aggregated mana. Additional attack with certain Magic Skills will create a huge additional mana explosion. Collaboration with the cat results in a critical hit.

Wizard.name: Magic Research
Wizard.description:
Deepens your understanding of magic through research. Increases the power of "Imperial Ray" and shortens the casting time of magic used by the familiar.
Mana Crystal

Wizard.name: Mana Crystal
Wizard.description: Creates crystal that restores Mana. Pick it up to restore a small amount of MP. The cast time becomes longer if the familiar is doing something else when the skill is used.

Wizard.name: Stone Barrier
Wizard.description:
Familiar is told to perform a safeguard magic. It gives protection to reduce certain damage, but
the damage from Ignite and Poison increases (drawback)
. Can't be used repeatedly.

Wizard.name: Advanced Familia
Wizard.description:
Summons and makes familiar act unpredictably. Lightning, Blizzard or Meteor Strike is cast randomly at fixed time intervals.
Familiar's ability and the skill generated depends on the skill level acquired.
Staff
[Get the same effect when used with a Magic Device]
As the skill level goes up, the power of Lightning, Blizzard, and Meteor Strike increases.

Wizard.name: Kitty's Treasure
Wizard.description:
I'll put it here if there's any extra, meow!
The skill "Mana Crystal" may be deployed after a successful cast by the familiar.
Cast Mastery

Wizard.name: Cast Mastery
Wizard.description:
Accumulates knowledge to speed up incantation. Loses ATK in exchange for an increase in CSPD according to the acquisition status of Wizard Skills.
The attack power of familiar will not decrease.

Wizard.name: Crystal Laser
Wizard.description: Shoots out mana from Mana Crystal in a straight line to attack. Slightly restores the MP of the party members within the attack area.

Wizard.name: Overlimit
Sorcery Guide
Wizard.description: Mitigates CSPD loss due to Overlimit and increases element power further.

Wizard.name: Shift
Wizard.description:
Slips into another dimension to escape from danger. During Shift, you will be unable to attack and MP will be drained continuously, but your aggro will be removed and you will always be [Invincible].
The effect cannot be triggered if you are being targeted.
Staff
[Get the same effect when used with a Magic Device]
Avoiding damage during Shift will give you Action Speed boost when you return to the original dimension according to the number of times you avoid it. (
max 60 seconds
)

Hunter.name: Kick
Hunter.description: Kick an enemy and create distance. Deal damage and Knock Back the target.

Hunter.name: Sunrise Arrow
Hunter.description:
A strong shot with the energy of the Sun. Deal damage in the straight line toward the target. 2x Damage on Sleeping enemies.
Arrow
Power increases depending on DEX.
Range (Horizontal) +1m

Hunter.name: Magic Arrow
Hunter.description:
Strengthen arrows with magic. Slightly increase Weapon ATK and Attack MP Recovery. Normal Attack is enhanced by MATK. The effect ends after using Normal Attacks certain number of times.
Arrow
MATK amount that affects normal attack power +90%
Attack MP recovery +1
Boost on the Number of Effective Attacks

Hunter.name: Satellite Arrow
Hunter.description:
A highly difficult technique to attack from a high altitude. You need to be highly skilled to hit the target as the attack takes some time.
Arrow
DEX affects Power.
Range (Radius) +0.5m

Hunter.name: Focus
Hunter.description:
Issues a hunting command. Marks an enemy as a "target".
Increases long-range attack power (
from party members too
) to the target.
Bow
"Satellite Arrow" will land on the target faster and will be re-aimed after each attack.
Bowgun
The interval between "Satellite Arrow" hits becomes shorter from the second hit onward.
Dagger
[Get the same effect when used with a shield]
Adds a passive effect that increases close-range attack power on target (starting from Skill Lv2).
Sleep Trap

Hunter.name: Sleep Trap
Hunter.description:
Set a sleeping gas trap. Chance to inflict [Sleep] on the target. Unable to set at feet. It can be broken by Area of Effect.
Arrow
DEX affects Power.
Range (Radius) +1m
Sleep Rate +20%
MP Recovery with Trap Activation +100

Hunter.name: Bear Trap
Hunter.description:
Set a bear trap. Chance to inflict [Stop] on the target. Unable to set at feet. It can be broken by Area of Effect.
Arrow
DEX affects Power.
Range (Radius) +1m
Stop Rate +20%
MP Recovery with Trap Activation +100

Hunter.name: Land Mine
Hunter.description:
Set an explosive trap. Low chance to inflict [Ignite] on the trapped enemy. Unable to set under the enemy's feet. The trap can be broken by Area of Effect.
Arrow
DEX and TEC affect Power.
Range (Radius) +1m
Burn Rate +80%
MP Recovery with Trap Activation +100

Hunter.name: Dark Trap
Hunter.description:
Sets a trap that steals power. Low chance to inflict [Lethargy] on the target that steps on it. Can't be set directly under the enemy's feet and may be broken by AOE.
Arrow
DEX affects Power.
Range (Radius) +1m
Lethargy Rate +20%
MP Recovery with Trap Activation +100

Hunter.name: Camouflage
Hunter.description:
Greatly reduces aggro that depends on MP consumption, increases ATK and Critical Rate for 180 seconds.
If targeted while the effect is active, the effect will be lost and you will be (
*
)stunned.
All Weapons
(
*
)When not in a party, you won't be stunned.
Bow
Half of the aggro reduction effect from Camouflage that depends on MP consumption will always be active as a passive effect even if the skill is not activated.
The duration of stun due to Camouflage becomes half.
Bowgun
Half of the Critical Rate boost effect from Camouflage will always be active as a passive effect even if the skill is not activated.
The duration of stun due to Camouflage becomes half.
Homing Shot

Hunter.name: Homing Shot
Hunter.description:
Shoots a magic arrow that pursues threats. "Normal attack proration" is applied. The number of shots and accuracy get higher depending on the skill level. Slightly increases MP when hitting a target.
Arrow
Skill Power +200
MP Heal Amount x2
Evasion Pierce (
not including special Evasions <events or mechanisms>
)

Hunter.name: Detection
Hunter.description:
Ability to sense danger in nature. Reduces Aggro against you and slightly increases Critical Rate for 40sec. The effect ends when you are targeted.
Bow
[Get the same effect when used with a Bowgun]
When the effect ends due to being targeted, you will automatically perform Shot Skill: "Decoy Shot".

Hunter.name: Cyclon Arrow
Hunter.description:
An arrow skill that creates a tornado. Deals small damage but has a chance to inflict [Flinch] to a target and engulfs the monsters near it.
Arrow
Power increases depending on DEX.
2x Range (Radius)

Hunter.name: Vertical Air
Hunter.description:
A deadly arrow skill combining evasion and counterattack. The hit counts increase depending on the distance. (
Up to 3 times
) Grants [Invincible] to yourself when activating the skill.
Arrow
Physical Pierce of the 2nd Hit increases.
Physical Pierce of the 3rd Hit increases.

Hunter.name: Hunter Bowgun
Hunter.description: Enhances the versatility of hunting. Even with a non-arrow sub-weapon, Hunter Skills will exhibit the properties of arrow skills. Raising the skill level will increase Bowgun ATK.

Hunter.name: Multiple Hunt
Hunter.description:
Hunting techniques using Sub-Weapon. When activated using a weapon
other than
Dagger, Magic Device, or Shield, it deals damage to the target and there is a high chance to inflict [Armor Break] with higher Physical Pierce.
Magic Device
Uses magic to bind and shoot the target.
Deals magic damage to target. Chance to inflict [Stop] and then releases an AoE (physical damage).
Guarantees critical to the target inflicted with [Stop].
Shield
Shoots while holding the shield up in front.
Power increases according to VIT.
Reduces damage received while the skill is in effect.
Successfully activating the skill will add an HP recovery effect to skill damage for 10 seconds, and physical/magic resistance based on your shield's refinement value will increase.
Dagger
Executes a surprise attack with a dagger followed by an attack with a bowgun.
Power increases according to AGI.
Halves the MP Cost of the skill used next and slightly increases the power of close range attacks.

Hunter.name: Hunter Knowledge
Hunter.description: Accumulates knowledge about various hunting tools. Increases the power of the skill "Multiple Hunt".

DarkPower.name: Bloody Bite
DarkPower.description:
A dark magic to feed on enemy's blood.
Inflict damage to a target and absorb a part of damage dealt as HP. The heal amount depends on your level.

DarkPower.name: Dark Stinger
DarkPower.description:
The power of darkness in your right arm bursts.
Use 10% of the current HP and deal damage. Lower MaxHP for 10 seconds. (Up to 5 times.) If you use Bloody Bite while this effect is active, remove the negative effect and heal HP.

DarkPower.name: Red Tear
DarkPower.description:
Hatred turns to tears of blood and takes down foes.
When being targeted by a foe, you start bleeding. If not, reduce Aggro. HP Cost of Dark Energy is removed while it's active.

DarkPower.name: Soul Hunter
DarkPower.description:
My determination got the best of me.
Consuming HP raises the effect (
max 10 Levels
). Chance to inflict [Fear] on the target.
Get MP Recovery if the effect is raised and wield the hunted soul as a scythe to attack the surroundings.
Katana
Power increases depending on DEX.
Chance to inflict Fear drops greatly.
1-Handed Sword
Power increases depending on STR.
2-Handed Sword
[Get the same effect when used with a Halberd]
Range (Radius) +2m
Chance to inflict Fear drops drastically.
Bow
[Get the same effect when used with a Bowgun]
Power greatly drops, but activation is focused on target.
Chance to inflict Fear drops slightly.
Staff
[Get the same effect when used with a Magic Device]
Chance to inflict Fear drops.
MP Heal Amount increases.
Knuckle
Power increases depending on AGI.

DarkPower.name: Sacrifice
DarkPower.description:
Curse an enemy by sacrificing your life.
Deal special damage using 10% of MaxHP. You will become stunned if HP is not enough.

DarkPower.name: Demon Claw
DarkPower.description:
The demon inside rages for blood.
Attack the targets targeting allies. Attack up to 10 targets but damage is distributed. When activated, power increases as your HP is lower and does not generate Aggro.

DarkPower.name: Regretless
DarkPower.description:
Even if my life ends here. I shall have no regrets.
Restore all HP. Reduce MaxHP and enhance stats for a few seconds. (Can be overlapped.)
You will die when the effect ends.
First-Aid, Struggle, Revive Droplets Unavailable.

DarkPower.name: Eternal Nightmare
DarkPower.description:
Are you living in a dream or a nightmare?
Constantly consume HP to lower monster's defense and enhance Dark Power skills up to tier 3.
Raises Dark Resistance but lowers Light Resistance while active.
All Weapons
Lowered defense amount depends on Dark Power's total level.
Raises max amount healed with Bloody Bite.
Raises Sacrifice's stability.
Raises Dark Stinger's power in proportion to the HP consumption.
Eases HP criteria for maximizing Demon Claw's power.
Red Tear's no. of attacks added.
Adds a slim chance of avoiding regret after Regretless.

MagicBlade.name: Magic Warrior Mastery
MagicBlade.description:
Reduce the ATK decrease applied when equipping a sub magic device and increase MATK and CSPD a little.
1-Handed Sword
ATK decline penalty is further reduced by 5%.

MagicBlade.name: Conversion
MagicBlade.description:
When equipping One-Handed Swords, Two-Handed Swords, Bowguns and Knuckles, Weapon ATK affects MATK like Staffs and Magic Devices.
Magic Device
[This effect is only for OHS/Bowgun/Knuckles]
The skill can be added to shortcuts.
While Conversion is in effect, physical and magic properties will undergo a swap only for Magic Blade skills.
It can be canceled by reusing Conversion.
Knuckle
The impact of Weapon ATK on MATK is halved.

MagicBlade.name: Resonance
MagicBlade.description:
Resonance of vitality and magic power. Enhance stats randomly for 30 seconds and average Current HP and MP. This skill cannot be overlapped.
Unavailable if MaxHP is lower than MaxMP.

MagicBlade.name: Enchanted Spell
MagicBlade.description:
A special magic that infuses a spell to a weapon in advance. Activates some magic skills by syncing them with certain actions. The cooldown time varies depending on the activated skills.
Magic Device
[Magic Skills that may reactivate]
โ€ขMagic: Arrows
โ€ขMagic: Javelin
โ€ขMagic: Wall
โ€ขMagic: Lances
โ€ขMagic: Blast
โ€ขThe element depends on the Magic Device equipped

MagicBlade.name: Dual Bringer
MagicBlade.description:
Keeps ATK and MATK high through resonance during the effect duration that depends on the ability of magic device. Gets a critical bonus when attacking a weakened target.
This skill effect is only for Magic Blade Skills.
1-Handed Sword
The effect applies to Magic Skills too.
The magic skill activated depends on the element of the magic device.
Certain magic skills will accumulate Enchanted Burst.
Magic Device
[This effect is only for magic device as sub-weapon.]
The more Magic Blade skills acquired, the greater the amplification effect of this skill is.
*Up to a maximum of 10 skills.

MagicBlade.name: Ether Flare
MagicBlade.description: A simplified magic for warriors. Chance to inflict [Ignite], if successful, ATK MP Recovery will increase for a few seconds. Skill power will increase further if it is also your weak element.

MagicBlade.name: Element Slash
MagicBlade.description: Slash enemies with a magic blade. The element depends on the sub magic device. Accuracy rates affect this skill. Chance to inflict [Weakness]

MagicBlade.name: Enchant Sword
MagicBlade.description: The element power turns into a blade that pierce through enemies. Attack with the target's weak element regardless of your element. Magic device ability increases Critical Rate during normal (physical) attacks, and Magic Pierce during magic attacks.

MagicBlade.name: Enchanted Burst
MagicBlade.description:
Releases accumulated elemental power. Inflicts [Weaken] and the power increases (
Max 3
) if Enchant Sword hits the target. Using more accumulated power will extend the effect that increases the power of Enchant Sword.
Magic Device
[This effect is only for magic device as sub-weapon.]
When switching to physical properties due to Conversion, the attack will be a physical attack that doesn't use accumulated power, and it will grant an MP recovery effect to the player who attacks the target.

MagicBlade.name: Union Sword
MagicBlade.description: A secret technique of wielding a colossal sword created with mana. Performs a wide range attack in a straight line. When under the enhancement effect of Enchanted Burst, it will activate quickly by consuming its effect duration.

MagicBlade.name: Siphon Barrier
MagicBlade.description:
A defense technique converted into mana through a barrier.
Reduces physical/magic damage received during the skill and slightly restores MP. The amount restored increases if magic damage gets reduced.

MagicBlade.name: Teleport
MagicBlade.description:
A technique to dodge attacks by instantly moving to another point.
While casting Teleport, press a direction key to instantly move to that direction.
1-Handed Sword
MP Cost -100

MagicBlade.name: Siphon Recall
MagicBlade.description:
Gets an additional status that continues to restore MP when damage is successfully reduced by Siphon Barrier. The heal amount changes based on the value obtained from Siphon Barrier.
Staff
MP Heal Amount -50%

MagicBlade.name: Float Dash
MagicBlade.description:
Urgently deploys magic device for high-speed flight. Movement speed greatly increases for 10 seconds in exchange for being unable to perform a normal attack. The effect ends when any skill is activated. MP Cost of the activated skill is halved.
1-Handed Sword
Removes [Slow] and [Stop] when active.

MagicBlade.name: Magic Skin
MagicBlade.description:
The refinement value of magic device will have the same damage reduction effect as that of shield. Furthermore, the more MP left, the more often physical/magic damage will be reduced.
Magic Device
[This effect is only for magic device as sub-weapon.]
When taking a fatal damage exceeding your MaxHP, there is a chance that 1 HP will be left. But once activated, this effect won't activate for a while and you will also temporarily lose the damage reduction effect based on your remaining MP.

Ninja.name: Ninjutsu
Ninja.description:
Foreign and unconventional ninja magic. Activates a random ninjutsu when used. If a Ninjutsu Scroll skill is activated, the level will be the same as the level of this skill.
EX Skill "Create Ninjutsu Scroll" can be used.

Ninja.name: Ninja Spirit
Ninja.description: Learns the rules of shinobi (ninja). Slightly boost Dodge and reduces Aggro a little. If this skill is Lv10, the skill "Two-Handed" will be applicable even if a Ninjutsu Scroll is equipped.

Ninja.name: Ninjutsu Drill I
Ninja.description: Enhances the skills activated with Ninjutsu.

Ninja.name: Ninjutsu Drill II
Ninja.description:
Enhances the skills activated with Ninjutsu.
It doesn't matter whether you learn Ninjutsu Drill I or II first because the enhancement value will be the same.

Partisan.name: L Boomerang
Partisan.description:
Throws Lepage's boomerang sword. It will only hit the target and return after traveling a certain distance with the chance of hitting the target again.
The skill will do no damage without a boomerang.
L Boomerang II

Partisan.name: L Boomerang II
Partisan.description:
Throws the boomerang while moving backward, however, it is less powerful.
Without a boomerang, you will only move backward.
L Boomerang III

Partisan.name: L Boomerang III
Partisan.description:
Critical Rate and Physical Pierce go up. The boomerang will go after the target. It will return after traveling a certain distance or colliding with an obstacle with the chance of hitting the target again.
The skill will do no damage without a boomerang.
N Dragon Tooth

Partisan.name: N Dragon Tooth
Partisan.description:
The Dragon Tooth invented by Nino. Attacks the target and moves backward. Slightly raises the piercing power of the next skill used.
Acquiring the skill "Dragon Tooth" will increase the power further.
Healing Shot

Partisan.name: Healing Shot
Partisan.description:
Consumes your own HP (
min 100
) and shoots a straight healing arrow toward the furthest party member.
The heal amount is different for mercenary, partner, and pet.
Arrow Sharpening

Partisan.name: Arrow Sharpening
Partisan.description:
Enhances the next normal attack used.
STR increases Physical Pierce, AGI increases Action Speed, and DEX increases critical performance.
Survival Instinct

Partisan.name: Survival Instinct
Partisan.description:
Increases MaxHP and Fractional Damage Reduction for 20 seconds when a party member gets knocked out.
Doesn't activate if knocked out due to certain conditions.
Frontliner

Partisan.name: Frontliner
Partisan.description:
The determination to never back down. Increases your own Aggro and raises the increase of Aggro for 60 seconds. Additionally gains Physical Barrier according to the number of nontarget members.
Frontliner II

Partisan.name: Frontliner II
Partisan.description: Gains Magic Barrier too when gaining Physical Barrier from the skill "Frontliner". Additionally, there is a passive effect that increases MaxHP permanently in line with skill acquisition.

Necromancer.name: Grave Digger
Necromancer.description:
Deploys a conceptual graveyard to prepare for necromancy.
Spirit stacks are gained while in the graveyard.
Spirit slowly returns if you leave the graveyard.
Phantom Missile

Necromancer.name: Phantom Missile
Blood Siphon
Necromancer.description:
Puts a blood-sucking curse on the target. A portion of the damage dealt is absorbed as HP. Warning: Low chance to absorb status ailments too.
Chance to inflict [Flinch] if VIT is 50 or higher.
The curse is instantly removed when the target is too far.
Soul Stream

Necromancer.name: Soul Stream
Necromancer.description:
Unleashes a spiritual particle beam.
Performs a magic attack. Restores MP and raises the chance to inflict [Lethargy] based on spirit stacks used. The number of spirit stacks used depends on the amount of MP consumed when the skill is activated. (
max 20
)
Skeleton Call

Necromancer.name: Skeleton Call
Necromancer.description:
Uses 3 spirit stacks to summon a skeleton soldier. (
max 3 on the field
)
The soldier performs close-range attack. It explodes and disappears when caught in an AoE.
Attack power is based on ATK or MATK, whichever is higher.
Demonic Pact

Necromancer.name: Demonic Pact
Necromancer.description:
A contract with a demon. The ability changes based on the amount of MP offered when forming the contract. Each attack by the demon costs the caster some HP. Reusing the skill will terminate the contract.
The demon may betray you if things turn bad.
Fine Shovel

Necromancer.name: Fine Shovel
Necromancer.description:
Gains additional spirit stacks when deploying "Grave Digger" for the first time.
You can now continue gaining spirit stacks even when slightly away from the graveyard.
Harvest

Necromancer.name: Harvest
Necromancer.description:
Recovers a small amount of HP and MP instantly when a monster is killed.
(activates only once per second.)
A skeleton soldier will be summoned upon recovery if "Skeleton Call" has been acquired. (
There can't be more than 3 skeleton soldiers on the field.
)
Opportunist

Necromancer.name: Opportunist
Necromancer.description:
The effect of "Harvest" may still be applied even when a skeleton soldier explodes and disappears.
Tomb

Necromancer.name: Tomb
Necromancer.description:
Summons tombstones that spike out of the ground. Performs a physical attack on the target.
Chance to inflict [Tumble] if VIT is 50 or higher.
Using 3 spirit stacks adds an AoE attack, activating up to 3 times at once.
Skull Shaker

Necromancer.name: Skull Shaker
Necromancer.description:
Delivers a heavy blow to the top of the head with a staff. Performs a physical attack to the target. Chance to inflict [Dizzy]. Each successful hit increases the power and may inflict [Stun] on the target. The effect resets upon inflicting [Stun].
Hazard Strike

Necromancer.name: Hazard Strike
Necromancer.description:
A versatile staff technique that changes according to the situation. A physical attack that can trigger a follow-up move by consuming an additional 100 MP depending on key input.
Up (high power), Left/Right (damage reduction), Down (backstep)
